phrases.intent_en: Where is the São Miguel Fort viewpoint?
phrases.text_local: Onde está o miradouro do Forte de São Miguel?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO FAW-ruh-tih DIH SOWN mee-GEHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The fort houses a historic chapel and offers panoramic views over the beach.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no cimo da falésia.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO SEE-moo DUH fuh-LEHZ-yuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the top of the cliff.

responses.english: Good morning, at the top of the cliff.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO SEE-moo DUH fuh-LEHZ-yuh.
responses.french: Bom dia, no cimo da falésia.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Miradouro do Subercioso?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-bih-ruh-SEEOH-zoo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Subercioso.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-bih-ruh-SEEOH-zoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Subercioso Viewpoint.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Subercioso Viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-bih-ruh-SEEOH-zoo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Miradouro do Subercioso.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the elevator ticket booth?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteria do elevador?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-tih-REEUH DOO eh-lih-vuh-DOHR?
phrases.cultural_note: The elevator connects the lower town to the historic Sítio cliff area.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Elevador da Nazaré.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW eh-lih-vuh-DOHR DUH nuh-zuh-REH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Nazaré Elevator.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Nazaré Elevator.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW eh-lih-vuh-DOHR DUH nuh-zuh-REH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Elevador da Nazaré.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Miradouro do Subercioso?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO soo-bih-ruh-SEEOH-zoo?
phrases.cultural_note: This viewpoint is located on the Sítio cliff, offering panoramic views of the beach and ocean.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no topo da falésia.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO TAW-poo DUH fuh-LEHZ-yuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the top of the cliff.

responses.english: Good morning, at the top of the cliff.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO TAW-poo DUH fuh-LEHZ-yuh.
responses.french: Bom dia, no topo da falésia.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the giant waves platform?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a plataforma das ondas gigantes?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DUHSH OHNG-duhsh zhee-GAHNNG-tihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The platform is located in the water for surfers tackling record-breaking waves.

likely_response.local: A plataforma fica no Forte de São Miguel Arcanjo.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh FEE-kuh NOO FAW-ruh-tih DIH SOWN mee-GEHL uh-ruh-KAHNNG-zhoo.
likely_response.translation_en: The platform is at Forte de São Miguel Arcanjo.

responses.english: The platform is at Forte de São Miguel Arcanjo.
responses.phonetic: AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh FEE-kuh NOO FAW-ruh-tih DIH SOWN mee-GEHL uh-ruh-KAHNNG-zhoo.
responses.french: A plataforma fica no Forte de São Miguel Arcanjo.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the São Miguel Fort viewpoint?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Forte de São Miguel Arcanjo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW FAW-ruh-tih DIH SOWN mee-GEHL uh-ruh-KAHNNG-zhoo?
phrases.cultural_note: The fort is at the northern tip of the beach, near the lighthouse, offering views of the giant wave platform.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no extremo do paredão.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO ehst-REH-moo DOO puh-rih-DOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the end of the seawall.

responses.english: Good morning, at the end of the seawall.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO ehst-REH-moo DOO puh-rih-DOWN.
responses.french: Bom dia, no extremo do paredão.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Farol da Nazaré?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW fuh-RAWL DUH nuh-zuh-REH?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Farol da Nazaré.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW fuh-RAWL DUH nuh-zuh-REH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Farol da Nazaré.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Farol da Nazaré.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW fuh-RAWL DUH nuh-zuh-REH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Farol da Nazaré.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the elevator ticket booth?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira do elevador?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO eh-lih-vuh-DOHR?
phrases.cultural_note: The elevator ticket booth is located at the top station in Sítio, not at the bottom in Praia.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Elevador da Nazaré.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW eh-lih-vuh-DOHR DUH nuh-zuh-REH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Nazaré Elevator.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Nazaré Elevator.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW eh-lih-vuh-DOHR DUH nuh-zuh-REH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Elevador da Nazaré.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay camping parking
phrases.text_local: Onde pago a taxa de estacionamento para campismo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAH-goo AH TAH-shuh DIH shtuh-seeoo-nuh-MAYNG-too PUH-ruh kahnm-PEEZH-moo?
phrases.cultural_note: Camping parking fees are collected via meters located on the Sítio plateau, not at beach level.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, nos parquímetros do Sítio.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOOSH puh-ruh-KEE-miht-roosh DOO SEET-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the Sítio parking meters.

responses.english: Good morning, at the Sítio parking meters.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOOSH puh-ruh-KEE-miht-roosh DOO SEET-yoo.
responses.french: Bom dia, nos parquímetros do Sítio.

phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra o farol da Nazaré?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AW fuh-RAWL DUH nuh-zuh-REH?
phrases.cultural_note: The lighthouse marks the highest point overlooking the famous surfing break.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no topo do Sítio.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO TAW-poo DOO SEET-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the top of Sítio.

responses.english: Good morning, at the top of Sítio.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO TAW-poo DOO SEET-yoo.
responses.french: Bom dia, no topo do Sítio.
